problem id: 129d29e1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) XOR SHL(5)

examples:
  00111110 -> 10111100
  01100010 -> 10000100
  11100111 -> 00101111
  11001011 -> 11110111
  00000000 -> 00000000
  11111111 -> 00011111
  00011010 -> 01110100
  10100110 -> 10001101

query: 00010011
predicted answer: 01000110
